title: Protocol for Search Strategy and Data Extraction: "Barriers to healthcare for racialized populations in Europe: a scoping review of reviews"
author: González-Rábago, Yolanda
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This scoping review of reviews aims to identify and categorize the barriers to healthcare faced by racialised populations in Europe, with a particular focus on the impacts of racism and racial discrimination within healthcare systems
steps_raw: This scoping review of reviews aims to identify and categorize the barriers to healthcare faced by racialised populations in Europe, with a particular focus on the impacts of racism and racial discrimination within healthcare systems
